name: krypton-lang
description: Syntax highlighting + language server (kls) for the Krypton programming language (.k libraries / .ks scripts)

krypton.kls.path.description: Path to the kls (Krypton Language Server) binary — kls.exe on Windows, kls on macOS/Linux. Leave empty to look it up on PATH or alongside the extension.

krypton.kls.enabled.description: Enable the kls language server (diagnostics, document symbols, completion). Disable for syntax highlighting only.

krypton.kls.trace.description: Log every JSON-RPC frame sent and received to the 'Krypton LSP' output channel. Noisy.
